hooks.command: input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r 'try (.tool_input.file_path) // ""'); content=$(echo "$input" | jq -r 'try (.tool_input.content // .tool_input.new_string) // ""'); if echo "$file" | grep -qE 'src/subscriptions/([^/]+)/'; then src_sub=$(echo "$file" | sed -nE 's|.*src/subscriptions/([^/]+)/.*|\1|p'); cross=$(echo "$content" | grep -oE "from ['\"]@/subscriptions/[^/'\"]+" | grep -vE "@/subscriptions/${src_sub}\b" || true); if [ -n "$cross" ]; then echo "[customer-dev hook] ⚠️  Cross-subscription import detected in ${file}. Rule: a subscription NEVER imports from another subscription. Promote shared code to src/components|src/hooks|src/services. Offending line(s):" >&2; echo "$cross" >&2; fi; fi; exit 0

input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r 'try (.tool_input.file_path) // ""'); content=$(echo "$input" | jq -r 'try (.tool_input.content // .tool_input.new_string) // ""'); if echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$'; then if echo "$content" | grep -qE '(: *any\b|<any>|as any\b|Record<string, *any>|Array<any>)'; then echo "[customer-dev hook] ⚠️  'any' detected in ${file}. Project rule: no 'any' — use specific types, generics, or 'unknown' + type guards." >&2; fi; if echo "$content" | grep -qE 'dangerouslySetInnerHTML'; then echo "[customer-dev hook] 🛑 dangerouslySetInnerHTML in ${file}. XSS risk — sanitize with DOMPurify or avoid. Justify with a comment if truly necessary." >&2; fi; if echo "$content" | grep -qE 'eslint-disable.*react-hooks/exhaustive-deps'; then echo "[customer-dev hook] ⚠️  exhaustive-deps disabled in ${file}. Usually the hook is mis-designed (stale closure). Fix the deps instead of silencing." >&2; fi; if echo "$content" | grep -qE 'key=\{[a-zA-Z_]*[iI]ndex\}'; then echo "[customer-dev hook] ⚠️  key={index} detected in ${file}. Anti-pattern: causes subtle state bugs on reorder. Use a stable unique id." >&2; fi; fi; exit 0

input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r 'try (.tool_input.command) // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^[[:space:]]*git +push'; then echo "[customer-dev hook] 🔔 Reminder: CI will run lint + format:check + typecheck + test:threshold (75% perFile) + build. Run 'npm run quality:check && npm run build' locally first to avoid a red CI." >&2; fi; exit 0
